/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libcustom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/custom_messages/msg/detail/slow__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/copperbottoms/code/Copperbottoms/ros_ws/build/custom_messages: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libcustom_messages__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
